'''Nova Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] built in the remains of the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]] after it was destroyed, to replace it as a waystation on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. It contained the [[Big Boom]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]].

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''
